films.title: No One Lives
films.overview: A gang of ruthless highway killers kidnap a wealthy couple traveling cross country only to shockingly discover that things are not what they seem.

films.title: The Signal
films.overview: On a road trip, Nic and two friends are drawn to an isolated area by a computer genius. When everything suddenly goes dark, Nic regains consciousness – only to find himself in a waking nightmare.

films.title: The Bikeriders
films.overview: After a chance encounter, headstrong Kathy is drawn to Benny, member of Midwestern motorcycle club the Vandals. As the club transforms into a dangerous underworld of violence, Benny must choose between Kathy and his loyalty to the club.

films.title: The Gift
films.overview: Simon and Robyn are a young married couple whose life is going as planned until a chance run-in with Simon's high school acquaintance sends their world into a tailspin.

films.title: Southpaw
films.overview: Billy "The Great" Hope, the reigning junior middleweight boxing champion, has an impressive career, a loving wife and daughter, and a lavish lifestyle. However, when tragedy strikes, Billy hits rock bottom, losing his family, his house and his manager. He soon finds an unlikely savior in Tick Willis, a former fighter who trains the city's toughest amateur boxers. With his future on the line, Hope fights to reclaim the trust of those he loves the most.

films.title: Sand Castle
films.overview: Set during the occupation of Iraq, a squad of U.S. soldiers try to protect a small village.

films.title: The Nice Guys
films.overview: A private eye investigates the apparent suicide of a fading porn star in 1970s Los Angeles and uncovers a conspiracy.

films.title: My Days of Mercy
films.overview: The daughter of a man on death row falls in love with a woman on the opposing side of her family's political cause.

films.title: Death Wish
films.overview: A mild-mannered father is transformed into a killing machine after his family is torn apart by a violent act.

films.title: Destroyer
films.overview: When Erin Bell was a young cop, she was given an undercover assignment that ended badly and destroyed her life. Years later, she must face her demons in order to make peace with her past.

films.title: Crypto
films.overview: A young agent is tasked with investigating a tangled web of corruption and fraud in New York.

films.title: Black and Blue
films.overview: Rookie cop Alicia West, an Army veteran, inadvertently captures the murder of a young drug dealer on her body cam. After realizing that the murder was committed by corrupt cops, she teams up with the one person from her community who is willing to help her as she tries to escape both the criminals out for revenge and the police who are desperate to destroy the incriminating footage.
